name: Lady's Dragonmaid
name_jp: ドラゴンメイド・ラティス
desc:
2 "Dragonmaid" monsters with the same Attribute but different Levels
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above monsters, 1 each from your field and GY. If this card is Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Dragonmaid" monster from your Deck. During the Standby Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Dragon Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling its materials from your field and/or banishment into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Lady's Dragonmaid" once per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns from your field to your Extra Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck by effect
Returns the player's banished cards to the Extra Deck
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses the player's banished cards as Fusion Materials
Returns Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon to Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
